div.div:
LEGEND
Physical Links
— White solid (w=2): Routed / WAN / P2P
— White solid (w=2): LAN access port
Tunnel Overlay
— White dotted (w=1, dash=1 4):
GRE bare (unencrypted)
Tunnel0: R1 ↔ R4, arcs left of R3
Zones
— Teal dashed: Global Underlay
(OSPF Process 1 — transit core)
Label Rule
Label on side with no links;
default: bottom
